value.author: codex-pm-ecosystem-audit-20260625
value.text: Read-only SDK/packages/MCP/customization lane complete. Evidence: inspected AGENTS.md, pm-sdk/pm-extensions guidance, pm context/list/get, status-all duplicate searches, runtime contracts, package/schema surfaces, SDK exports/testing helpers, MCP tool definitions, package catalog, and schema preset implementation. Canonical reuse: pm-doxj, pm-8jdc, pm-ugqx, pm-5k4v, with pm-b4cp/pm-srex as audit evidence buckets. Backlog is strong for low-level primitives: public SDK define/compose/testing helpers, packages/extensions, import/export, MCP schema/config/contracts, and schema types/statuses/fields/workflows. Gap: no open leaf captures a coherent universal PM baseline/profile composing types, fields, statuses, workflows, templates, config, and package selections for arbitrary project archetypes; current presets are type-only and package install is separate. Recommended creating profile, first-party package, and MCP profile-surface follow-ups.

value.author: codex-ecosystem-auditor
value.text: Lane closure evidence: SDK/package/MCP customization audit identified project profile composition as the major universal-PM primitive gap. Created pm-v37g, pm-a7o4, and pm-bhmk under the relevant epics with duplicate checks and acceptance criteria.
